form.formComment: Third race start today. When well in the market at debut, tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 1.75 len at this track 3yo Mdn-Sw March 8 over 1200m defeating Dark Galaxy with 58kg at $2.05. Last start raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 6th of 10 at Sale Bm62 on March 29 over 1200m, slow going 2.75 len behind Akicita with 60kg at $3.70. Can improve on the last effort and keep onside.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months 4th of 7 at Cranbourne 0-62 on April 3 over 1200m, 2.75 len behind Billund with 59.5kg at $5. Previously second-up 3rd of 11 at Albury Mdn-Sw on November 24 over 1175m, 4 len behind Raiderlicious with 54.5kg at $2.60. Plenty of improvement to come.

form.formComment: Most recently 2nd in a small field at Kerang Bm62 on April 4 over 1100m, 1.3 len behind Before The War with 58kg at $3.60. The race before that held ground to the line 2nd of 11 at Yarra Valley Cg&E Bm56 on March 24 over 1200m, slow going head behind Got Out The Fence with 61kg at $4.20. Racing well and consider.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of six months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign second last of 10 at Moonee Valley in the G2 Classic October 25 over 1600m, 7 len behind Salty Pearl with 57kg at $9. When resuming last campaign fourth of 12 at Sandown-Hillside 3yo Mdn-Sw September 24 over 1300m, 2 len behind Obucci carrying 56kg at $8. Expecting a bold return.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-8). Is first-up after a break of six months and has been in the money when fresh before. When resuming last campaign fourth of 12 at Sandown-Hillside 3yo Mdn-Sw September 24 over 1300m, 2 len behind Obucci carrying 56kg at $8. Expecting a bold return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Near the 1400m, taken Tisseyre slightly in.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At debut, 3rd of 10 at Pakenham Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1100m, on a slow track; 2 len behind Two To Tango carrying 57kg at $7.50. Second-up raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by 0.8 len at Geelong 3yo F Mdn-Sw April 1 over 1200m defeating Bonus Season carrying 57kg at $3.20. Heading the right way and is among the top hopes.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running from the 500m until passing the 200m.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation when last in a small field at Kembla Grange Cl1 October 13 over 1600m, 11 len behind Southern Prince with 56.5kg at $14. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.5 len Kembla Grange F&M Mdn September 27 over 1400m defeating Luna Bay with 58.5kg at $9.50. Will take great benefit from this outing.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months raced on the speed and boxed on steadily 4th of 7 at Kilmore Bm62 on March 31 over 1207m, on a slow track; 5 len behind Conflict with 55kg at $14. Previously second-up 3rd of 13 at Ballarat 4yo+ Mdn-Sw on October 24 over 1200m, slow going 0.6 len behind Tipsy Gypsy carrying 58kg at $8. Looks up against it here and prefer others.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out under pressure rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Returns from a 32-day let-up. At the latest run second last of 7 at Yarra Valley Bm62 on March 15 over 1200m, 7 len behind Superset with 57.5kg at $6. The start before that raced on speed throughout when 3rd of 9 at this track Bm66 on March 8 over 1200m, 1.3 len behind Charmed Run with 55.5kg at $6. Rates highly and expected to do much better.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly, shifted in and bumped Setlin Ace.

form.formComment: Most recently second last of 7 at Cranbourne F&M Bm66 on April 3 over 1300m, 7 len behind Hot Chips carrying 52kg at $41. Before that 2nd of 9 at this track 0 - 56 on March 21 over 1109m, 1.0 len behind Needawinna carrying 58kg at $6.50. Needs to improve sharply.
